r2ghidra.description: Ghidra-based decompiler, offers good quality C code

default.description: Default radare2 decompiler, fast but with more basic results

decai.description: AI-based decompiler with support for local LLM models through Ollama

r2dec.description: Alternative radare2 decompiler, specialized in specific architectures

qwen2.5-coder.name: ollama/hhao/qwen2.5-coder-tools:32b
qwen2.5-coder.description: Code specialized model, offers best decompilation quality

advanced_options.system_prompt: You are an expert in code decompilation. Your task is to analyze the assembly code and produce high-quality equivalent C code, maintaining the original functionality.

llama3.name: ollama/llama3
llama3.description: General purpose model, good balance between speed and quality

advanced_options.system_prompt: Decompile the assembly code to C code.

codellama.name: ollama/codellama
codellama.description: Code specialized model, good quality decompilation

advanced_options.system_prompt: Decompile the assembly code to C code.

comments.usage: To change the decompiler, modify the 'type' value to 'default', 'r2ghidra', 'r2dec', or 'decai'
comments.model: To change the AI model, modify the value of 'model' in the corresponding section
comments.available_models: In the 'models' section you will find predefined configurations for different models
comments.example_model_change: To use llama3, change the 'model' value to 'ollama/llama3' and adjust max_workers according to the recommendation
